case_title: DETRINIDAD, JESSIEKA et al VS ITO, LAUREN

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT ITO, LAUREN UNDER THE CALIFORNIA BUSINESS AND PROFESSIONS CODE SECTION 7026-7027, THE TERM "CONTRACTOR" IS VERY BROADLY DEFINED TO INCLUDE ANYONE WHO DOES ANY WORK ON A BUILDING PROJECT OF ANY KIND. PLAINTIFF DID NOT SUPPLY THE COURT WITH ANY EVIDENCE OF THE NOTICE REQUIRED BY CALIFORNIA BUSINESS AND PROFESSIONS CODE SECTION 7048(B). STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
